arts.ttl: Liverpool fans have concerning injury theory after Arne Slot names team for Plymouth clash

arts.ttl: Liverpool transfer news: Reds 'rekindle interest' in £6.9m Arne Slot favourite amid Virgil van Dijk uncertainty
arts.sum: Liverpool are reportedly back in the running for Feyenoord defender David Hancko, whom they were tipped to sign when Arne Slot first took charge.

arts.ttl: Arsenal could sign Liverpool attacker in shock transfer as Arne Slot 'frustrations' revealed
arts.sum: Arsenal could allegedly be offered the chance to sign Liverpool attacker Diogo Jota in a shock deal during the summer transfer window.

arts.ttl: Liverpool defender distraught after new injury as Isaac Mabaya makes debut against Plymouth
arts.sum: The stand-in Reds captain Joe Gomez was taken off early in the FA Cup clash on Sunday

arts.ttl: Liverpool lose key defender to injury early in Plymouth clash

arts.ttl: LIVE: Plymouth Argyle host Liverpool in FA Cup

arts.ttl: Arne Slot Could Sell Two Liverpool Stars Who Have ‘Frustrated’ Him This Season
arts.sum: The future of two players at Anfield are being monitored by Arne Slot.

arts.ttl: Plymouth Argyle v Liverpool: FA Cup – live
arts.sum: Updates from 3pm (GMT) kickoff at Home Park Get in touch: you can email Michael about the game "As a Liverpool fan, I’m thinking that starting eleven better get the job done, because that bench is about as thin as I’ve ever seen,” emails Joe Pearson. Yes, I’m not sure Slot is going to turn to his young guns in the unlikely event that things do go south for Liverpool. Curtis Jones and Darwin Nunez will surely be called upon, but I would expect to see a few debuts if the away side pull away. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Plymouth vs Liverpool: Confirmed Lineups, Team News and Score Prediction
arts.sum: Plymouth will hope to claim a huge FA Cup scalp when they take on Liverpool at Home Park today. Plymouth vs Liverpool Team News Plymouth are without injured trio Joe Edwards, Brendan Galloway and...

arts.ttl: Plymouth vs Liverpool - FA Cup: Live score, team news and updates as Arne Slot makes TEN changes from their Carabao Cup semi-final win as rampant Reds look to continue their quadruple quest with a win at Argyle
arts.sum: Follow Mail Sport's live blog of Plymouth vs Liverpool as Arne Slot's side look to avoid a shock upset in the fourth round of the FA Cup.
